title: Questions From Quarantine: Mental Health and Self-care During Times of Extreme Stress
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine. _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux, who provide guidance on maintaining mental health and self-care during the extreme stress of quarantine and global crisis. The series, titled 'Questions From Quarantine,' invites public participation by submitting questions via social media with a specific hashtag. It aims to offer practical advice for staying sane and sanitary, addressing the psychological challenges posed by prolonged isolation and pandemic-related anxieties. The initiative underscores the importance of accessible expert-led support for public well-being during emergencies.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目每周推出一档网络系列节目，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持，旨在为处于隔离和全球危机极端压力下的人们提供心理健康与自我护理指导。该系列名为“隔离之问”，鼓励公众通过社交媒体使用特定标签提交问题，以获得保持理智与卫生的实用建议。节目着重应对长期隔离和疫情相关焦虑带来的心理挑战，强调在紧急情况下由专家主导、易于获取的公众支持对于维护社会福祉的重要性。
